title: Review: nie-wallet payment stack (5 commits)
description: Deep pre-merge MY-OSS review of commits bc8cb12..21f531e: shielded tx builder, error types, db migration, /pay dispatch, post-review fixes.
notes:
Maintainer risk: MEDIUM — two P2 UX gaps (silent payment stall on reconnect, silent auto-payment disable) will generate user reports. One P1 crash-recovery bug (Payee/Sent resync gap) is low-frequency but correctness-relevant.
Confidence: 8% chance of missed bug. Uncertainty driven by: (1) resync_sessions state machine was not fully traced against the live dispatch_payment transitions — a full state-matrix audit would raise confidence; (2) happy-path tx tests require real Sapling params and don't run in CI without them, so the proof-generation path has lower test coverage than the error paths. Would raise confidence if: a full (role, state, action) matrix test were added to payment tests, and the params-present happy-path tests were run and passing.
